task: Apply decorators in the correct order: another_decorator wraps greet first, then my_decorator
error_location: lines 6-7: @my_decorator is outermost so it's applied last
clarification_query: In Python, which decorator in a stack is applied first (closest to the function)?
clarification_options: the one immediately above the function
expected_user_response: the one immediately above the function
explanation: Decorators are applied bottom-up. @another_decorator (closest to def) wraps first; @my_decorator wraps the result.
